result.productText: 13 顆衛星模擬展示 · 完整 ≥500 LEO 多軌道驗證見後續階段 LEO MEO GEO ✓ LEO MEO GEO ✓ LEO LEO LEO LEO LEO LEO MEO MEO MEO MEO MEO GEO GEO Scenario Scope Scope: 13-actor demo · LEO/MEO/GEO (6/5/2) Time: Sim replay 00:06 / 01:54 · replay · 60x Precision: operator-family precision Boundary: repo-owned projection · not measured truth Current: W1 LEO primary review Candidate: none promoted in W1 Fallback: MEO/GEO observed only Decision: LEO is usable now; watch service time Time/Quality: simulated remaining time; modeled quality strong focus · LEO Handover sequence State 1 of 5: LEO review focus Next: State 2 of 5 LEO pressure 1 LEO review LEO 2 LEO pressure LEO 3 MEO hold MEO 4 LEO re-entry LEO 5 GEO guard GEO Current state LEO review focus State 1 of 5 Pause Restart 30x 60x 120x Details Details Inspector Close Decision Metrics Boundary Evidence Selected replay window LEO review focus State 1 of 5 Replay UTC 2026-04-28T08:57:50.882Z Sim replay 00:06 / 01:54 Source provenance Decision · State Evidence 剛接上 OneWeb LEO · LEO review focus 剛接上 OneWeb LEO，連線品質強。約 22 分鐘後，因為位置條件變化會進入訊號減弱階段。 Now Now: LEO is the modeled primary service state for this window. Why Why: position conditions support low-latency LEO review focus. Next Next: watch for LEO aging pressure before the MEO hold window. Watch Watch: simulated service time and modeled quality class only. The simulation review is currently anchored on the OneWeb LEO context marked as the focus role. The five-state V4.6D model is in window 1 of 5. Watch the LEO actor for the early pressure signal — the next modeled state is LEO pressure. Endpoint precision remains operator-family only and no active gateway is being claimed. Boundary · Truth Boundary Truth boundary Simulation boundary: 13-actor demo, repo-owned projection, not measured truth. Service-layer boundary: modeled service handover, not native RF handover. Endpoint boundary: operator-family precision, not site-level gateway claim. Scale boundary: not >=500 LEO validation and not 24h hardware-GPU closeout. simulation output operator-family precision display-context actors Simulated display-context state, not an operator handover log. Source-lineaged display-context actors, not active serving satellites. Endpoint precision stays operator-family only. No active gateway assignment is claimed. No pair-specific teleport path is claimed. No measured latency, jitter, throughput, or continuity values are shown. No native RF handover is claimed. Implementation evidence 模擬展示 operator-family precision TLE: CelesTrak NORAD GP · 2026-04-26 13 actors Boundary & Sources 服務時間：~16 分鐘 下一段：訊號減弱 ~ 為模擬推演值
